ingredients.item: 4 large yellow potatoes (about 2¼ pounds, or 1 kg), peeled, washed, patted dry, and cut into 1½-inch-long x ½-inch-thick (4 x 1.3 cm) pieces
ingredients.original: 4 large yellow potatoes (about 2¼ pounds, or 1 kg), peeled, washed, patted dry, and cut into 1½-inch-long x ½-inch-thick (4 x 1.3 cm) pieces

ingredients.item:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley or cilantro
Juice of ½ lemon
ingredients.original:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley or cilantro
Juice of ½ lemon

ingredients.item: 1 Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and place a rack on the bottom.
ingredients.original: 1 Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and place a rack on the bottom.

ingredients.item: 2 Line a large, rimmed sheet pan with parchment paper and place the potatoes in the pan in a single layer. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons of the oil, then sprinkle with the paprika, salt, and coriander.
ingredients.original: 2 Line a large, rimmed sheet pan with parchment paper and place the potatoes in the pan in a single layer. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons of the oil, then sprinkle with the paprika, salt, and coriander.

ingredients.item: 3 Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the pan from the oven and flip the potatoes. Place the pan back into the oven and bake for 10 to 15 minutes longer, until the potatoes are crispy.
ingredients.original: 3 Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the pan from the oven and flip the potatoes. Place the pan back into the oven and bake for 10 to 15 minutes longer, until the potatoes are crispy.

ingredients.item: 4 In a small skillet, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and chili flakes and cook, stirring continuously, for 1 minute, or until the garlic is golden and fragrant.
ingredients.original: 4 In a small skillet, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and chili flakes and cook, stirring continuously, for 1 minute, or until the garlic is golden and fragrant.

ingredients.item: 5 Pour the hot oil over the baked potatoes and toss to combine.
ingredients.original: 5 Pour the hot oil over the baked potatoes and toss to combine.

ingredients.item: 6 Garnish with the chopped parsley or cilantro, a squeeze of lemon, and more chili flakes. Serve immediately.
ingredients.original: 6 Garnish with the chopped parsley or cilantro, a squeeze of lemon, and more chili flakes. Serve immediately.
